allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('/tmp/site.css','utf8'\); const m=css.match\(/\\.bg-\\\\\\\\\\\\[var\\\\\(--color-primary\\\\\\\\\\\\\)\\\\\\\\\\\\]\\\\{[^}]+\\\\}/\); console.log\(m ? m[0] : 'NOT FOUND'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('/tmp/site.css','utf8'\); const idx=css.indexOf\('.bg-\\\\\\\\[var\(--color-primary\)\\\\\\\\]'\); console.log\('idx:', idx\); if\(idx>=0\) console.log\(css.substring\(idx, idx+200\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('site.css','utf8'\); ['bg-[var','bg-\\\\\\\\[var','--color-primary\)\\\\\\\\]{','--color-primary\)]{'].forEach\(n => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(n\), '->', css.indexOf\(n\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('d:/crisma/dist/assets/index-6gYVpMPh.css','utf8'\); const m = [...css.matchAll\(/\\\\.bg-[^{]*color-primary[^{]*\\\\{[^}]+\\\\}/g\)]; m.forEach\(x => console.log\(x[0]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('site.css','utf8'\); const m = [...css.matchAll\(/:root[^}]*\\\\}/g\)]; m.forEach\(\(x,i\) => console.log\('---ROOT', i, '---'\); console.log\(x[0].substring\(0,500\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('site.css','utf8'\); const m = [...css.matchAll\(/:root[^}]*\\\\}/g\)]; console.log\('count:', m.length\); m.forEach\(\(x,i\) => { console.log\('---', i\); console.log\(x[0].substring\(0,800\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('site.css','utf8'\); const m = [...css.matchAll\(/:root[^}]*\\\\}/g\)]; const root = m[0][0]; console.log\('has --color-primary:', root.includes\('--color-primary'\)\); console.log\('has --color-text:', root.includes\('--color-text'\)\); console.log\('has --color-gold:', root.includes\('--color-gold'\)\); console.log\('---last 500---'\); console.log\(root.substring\(root.length - 500\)\);")
